context: Tests whether the agent implements the four email flow trigger functions with correct step counts, timing delays, template names, and cancellation logic when a customer converts. Covers the welcome series, post-purchase nurture, and win-back campaign specifications.

checklist.name: Welcome series 3 steps
checklist.description: The welcome flow schedules exactly 3 email steps (not 2, not 4)

checklist.name: Welcome step delays
checklist.description: Welcome step delays are: step 0 = 0ms (immediate), step 1 = 2 days (172800000ms or 2*86400000), step 2 = 7 days (604800000ms or 7*86400000)

checklist.name: Welcome trigger event
checklist.description: The welcome flow is documented or triggered on customer.created or newsletter signup event

checklist.name: Post-purchase 4 steps
checklist.description: The post-purchase flow schedules exactly 4 email steps

checklist.name: Post-purchase step delays
checklist.description: Post-purchase delays are: step 0 = 0ms, step 1 = 2 days, step 2 = 7 days, step 3 = 21 days (1814400000ms or 21*86400000)

checklist.name: Post-purchase template names
checklist.description: Post-purchase steps reference the four templates: 'order-confirmation', 'shipping-update', 'delivery-check-in', 'review-request' (in any form: string constants, enum values, or comments)

checklist.name: Cancel win-back on purchase
checklist.description: The post-purchase trigger function (or order.paid handler) cancels/removes pending win-back jobs for the customer before scheduling new emails

checklist.name: Win-back 3 thresholds
checklist.description: The win-back cron targets customers at exactly 3 thresholds: 60, 90, and 120 days since last order

checklist.name: Escalating win-back discounts
checklist.description: Win-back discount amounts escalate: 10% at 60 days, 15% at 90 days, 20% at 120 days

checklist.name: Win-back cron schedule
checklist.description: The win-back cron is scheduled at 8:00 AM daily (cron expression '0 8 * * *' or equivalent comment/annotation)

checklist.name: Skip already-queued win-back
checklist.description: Before enqueuing a win-back job, the code checks whether a job with that ID already exists and skips if it does

checklist.name: Cancel browse-abandon on cart add
checklist.description: An onCartItemAdded handler (or equivalent) removes pending browse-abandon jobs for the customer when they add to cart
